message:
refactor(abi,core,membrane): centralize set_abi_errno, replace dlsym passthrough macro with native implementations, fix pthread join/detach race, and improve realloc accounting

ABI layer refactoring:
- Centralize set_abi_errno() as a pub(crate) function in errno_abi.rs,
  removing ~20 duplicate private copies across dirent, grp, iconv, inet,
  io, locale, malloc, math, mmap, poll, process, pwd, resolv, resource,
  rpc, setjmp, signal, socket, startup, stdio, stdlib, string, termios,
  time, unistd, and wchar ABI modules
- Remove the dlsym_passthrough! macro from glibc_internal_abi.rs and
  replace dladdr1, dlinfo, and dlmopen with proper native implementations:
  dladdr1 delegates to crate::dlfcn_abi::dladdr and clears extra_info,
  dlinfo returns -1/ENOSYS, dlmopen delegates to dlopen ignoring namespace
- Apply rustfmt formatting fixes across all ABI modules (line wrapping,
  struct literal formatting, import ordering)
- Simplify io_internal_abi by removing unused helper code
- Update resolv_abi and process_abi with improved error handling and
  formatting for spawn attribute application

Core fixes:
- pthread thread.rs: fix use-after-free race in join_thread() and
  detach_thread() where the FINISHED fast-path freed the stack and
  handle before the kernel cleared tid via CLONE_CHILD_CLEARTID. Both
  paths now wait for tid==0 via futex before reclaiming resources.
- malloc allocator.rs: fix realloc total_allocated accounting to use
  exact delta arithmetic instead of saturating_sub + saturating_add,
  which could drift on repeated same-bin reallocs
- poll/mod.rs: simplify clamp_poll_nfds to single-line if expression

Membrane cleanup:
- arena.rs: fix trailing whitespace, reorder use imports alphabetically
- sos_barrier.rs, policy_table.rs, seqlock.rs: formatting and minor
  structural improvements
- Update support_matrix.json with current implementation status

Test updates:
- Simplify e2e_composition_test, hardened_mode_safety_test, and
  strict_mode_refinement_test to use the centralized set_abi_errno
- Update cve_corpus_normalization_test formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,290 @@
+{
+  "version": "v1",
+  "family": "io_internal",
+  "captured_at": "2026-03-20T00:00:00Z",
+  "description": "Internal glibc _IO_* stdio functions — native implementations for ABI compatibility. Most are no-ops, safe defaults, or stdio_abi delegates.",
+  "cases": [
+    {
+      "name": "IO_adjust_column_newline_resets",
+      "function": "_IO_adjust_column",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "col": 10, "line": "abc\\ndef", "count": 7 },
+      "expected_output": "3",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_adjust_column_tab_aligns",
+      "function": "_IO_adjust_column",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "col": 1, "line": "\\t", "count": 1 },
+      "expected_output": "8",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_adjust_column_null_line_returns_col",
+      "function": "_IO_adjust_column",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "col": 42, "line": null, "count": 0 },
+      "expected_output": "42",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_adjust_wcolumn_newline_resets",
+      "function": "_IO_adjust_wcolumn",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "col": 5, "line_wchars": [65, 10, 66], "count": 3 },
+      "expected_output": "1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_default_doallocate_returns_success",
+      "function": "_IO_default_doallocate",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_default_finish_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_default_finish",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL", "dummy": 0 },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_doallocbuf_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_doallocbuf",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_file_init_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_file_init",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_init_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_init",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL", "flags": 0 },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_free_backup_area_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_free_backup_area",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_free_wbackup_area_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_free_wbackup_area",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_link_in_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_link_in",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_un_link_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_un_link",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_list_lock_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_list_lock",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_list_unlock_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_list_unlock",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_list_resetlock_is_noop",
+      "function": "_IO_list_resetlock",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "void",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_iter_begin_returns_null",
+      "function": "_IO_iter_begin",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "NULL_PTR",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_iter_end_returns_null",
+      "function": "_IO_iter_end",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "NULL_PTR",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_iter_begin_equals_end_empty_list",
+      "function": "_IO_iter_begin",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": {},
+      "expected_output": "NULL_PTR",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both",
+      "notes": "begin==end signals empty iteration"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_marker_delta_returns_zero",
+      "function": "_IO_marker_delta",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "marker": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_marker_difference_returns_zero",
+      "function": "_IO_marker_difference",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "mark1": "NULL", "mark2": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_seekmark_returns_error",
+      "function": "_IO_seekmark",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL", "marker": "NULL", "delta": 0 },
+      "expected_output": "-1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_sungetc_returns_eof",
+      "function": "_IO_sungetc",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "-1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_sungetwc_returns_weof",
+      "function": "_IO_sungetwc",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "4294967295",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_str_overflow_returns_eof",
+      "function": "_IO_str_overflow",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL", "ch": 65 },
+      "expected_output": "-1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_str_underflow_returns_eof",
+      "function": "_IO_str_underflow",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "-1",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_wdefault_doallocate_returns_success",
+      "function": "_IO_wdefault_doallocate",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_wdefault_uflow_returns_weof",
+      "function": "_IO_wdefault_uflow",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "4294967295",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_wfile_sync_delegates_to_fflush",
+      "function": "_IO_wfile_sync",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both",
+      "notes": "fflush(NULL) flushes all streams"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "IO_switch_to_wget_mode_delegates_to_fflush",
+      "function": "_IO_switch_to_wget_mode",
+      "spec_section": "glibc libio internal",
+      "inputs": { "fp": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "0",
+      "expected_errno": 0,
+      "mode": "both"
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "dlinfo_returns_enosys",
+      "function": "dlinfo",
+      "spec_section": "GNU extension dlinfo(3)",
+      "inputs": { "handle": "NULL", "request": 0, "info": "NULL" },
+      "expected_output": "-1",
+      "expected_errno": 38,
+      "mode": "both",
+      "notes": "ENOSYS=38, linker metadata not maintained"
+    }
+  ]
+}
